headline: 5yo Liam 🧒🏠 ICE Cucks 😩🚫 ROASTED by Judge Daddy 👨‍⚖️💥
text:
Lil' Liam Conejo Ramos 🧒🐰🎒 and Daddy Adrian Alexander Conejo Arias 👨‍👦 from Ecuador 🇪🇨🚀 TOUCHED GRASS 🏠😍 in Minneapolis after ICE ❄️🧊 goons got SLAPPED 👋🔥 by Judge Fred Biery 👨‍⚖️⚖️ – who called their lockup 'CRUEL 😈💔 BEREFT OF HUMAN DECENCY 🥺' and a 'PERFIDIOUS LUST 👹🍆 FOR UNBRIDLED POWER ⚡'! Texas Dem HUNK Joaquin Castro 🧔🇺🇸📱 spilled the tea ☕: 'Liam's HOME 🏠❤️ with his HAT 🎩 and BACKPACK 🎒!' 🚀 No more Dilley Detention DUMP 🏚️🚫 – they BOOGIED 🕺 back from Texas hellhole! 

Protests POPPED OFF 🔥🗣️ outside the cage, NATIONAL OUTCRY 😱📢 had DHS simping 🤡: 'We DIDN'T TARGET no KIDDO 🧒!' But Judge Biery (Bill Clinton's BOY 👨‍💼💙) DROPPED BOMBS 💣: 'This GENESIS 🌱 from ILL-CONCEIVED 🚫🧠 DEPORT QUOTAS 📊 chasing DADDY TRUMP'S 🍊 WALL DREAMS 🧱 – TRAUMATIZING KIDS 😢🍼 for QUICKIE REMOVALS 💨!' Called for HUMANE 🫂 ORDERLY immig vibes, not this CHAOS 🤪! 

Ilhan Omar 👩‍🧕💅 (ICE's WORST NIGHTMARE 😈) posted: 'Welcome HOME Liam 🏠👏 thx Joaquin for the ESCORT 👮‍♂️🚗!' While VP JD Vance 🕶️🇺🇸 shrugged: 'Daddy RAN 🏃‍♂️💨, ICE had NO CHOICE 🤷‍♂️!' ICE X-rant 🐦💥: 'Criminal ILLEGAL 👹 DITCHED KIDDO in COLD ❄️😰, we KEPT HIM SAFE 🛡️ like HEROES 🦸‍♂️!' School peeps 🏫 spilled: ICE told 5yo to KNOCK KNOCK 🐒🚪 on his OWN DOOR 🏠, fam BEGGED 🤲 to take him INSIDE but NAH 🚫 – even board boss Mary Granlund 👩‍💼 tried, STILL CUFFED 😤! 

Family lawyer Marc Prokosch ⚖️🍆 YEETED facts: 'They DID EVERYTHING RIGHT ✅ from ECUADOR 🇪🇨 – CBP One APP 📱🚀, PORT ENTRY 🎯, ASYLUM HUSTLE 🆘, COURT DATES 🗓️, NO FLIGHT RISK ✈️🚫!' Not ELUDING 🕵️‍♂️, just CHILL VIBES 😎 following PROTOCOLS like GOOD BOIS 🐶. DHS STILL SALTY 🧂😣: 'TRUMP ERA 🍊👑 RESTORES RULE OF LAW 📜🔒 – ARREST, DETAIN, DEPORT INVADERS 👽💥!' But judge said HOLD MY GAVEL 🔨 – THIS FAMILY'S FREE 🕊️🏠! ICE BUBBLE POPPED 🫧💥, Liam's MOONING 🎉🍑 the haters! 😂🧒🚀
